extracted_by: HivemindMinion (Claude Code) from HivemindOverlord's licensed PoE2 install + PoB2 community repo

mods.note: Non-empty stat entries now include resolved stat_id strings inline (cross-referenced from data/game/stats/). Consumers no longer need a separate stats.json load to resolve stat_key refs.

ascendancies.note: display_name canonical (offset 44); base_class field promoted onto every entry (derived from id prefix); 14 DNT-UNUSED placeholders filtered via is_unused flag. Includes NEW 0.5 ascendancies Spirit Walker (Huntress2) and Martial Artist (Monk1).

stats.note: {row_index: stat_id} mapping; used to resolve stat_key refs in mods/passives/gems

skill_gems.source: PoB2 origin/dev @ 9c2bf0316 (2026-05-30) — Gems.lua + Skills/*.lua joined view
skill_gems.note: Joined gem-metadata + granted-effect records. Schema v1: levels/stat_sets surface a useful subset; full statMap / baseFlags / constantStats / stats lists are NOT yet extracted (require structural Lua parser — deferred to v2). Per-gem record count (872) is intentionally smaller than support_gems.record_count (680) because the two datasets cover different surface areas: this is the PoB2 gem-and-effect joined view; support_gems is the extracted .datc64 support-modifier table.

skill_gems_v2.source: PoB2 src/Data/Skills/*.lua via structural Lua parser (src/parsers/lua_skill_data.py)
skill_gems_v2.note: Rich per-skill numeric data — castTime, skillTypes, qualityStats, per-level {cost, critChance, levelRequirement}, and statSets with baseEffectiveness/constantStats/per-level damage arrays. Closes Issue #119. Distinct from skill_gems.json (the v1 joined view from Gems.lua); v2 covers a larger surface (1,249 records across 9 Skills/*.lua files) including Player/NPC/spectre/minion variants. Use v2 when you need numeric scaling, v1 when you need gem-shop metadata (tags, requirements, tier).

stat_descriptions.note: The canonical in-game stat description text. Pairs stat_id -> player-facing template. Replaces the hand-authored interpretation in src/knowledge/poe2_mechanics.py as the authoritative source for explain_mechanic going forward. v1 ships English-only templates across 18 root-level .csd files; per-skill descriptions under specific_skill_stat_descriptions/ deferred to v2. Headline category counts: stat_descriptions.csd 10,716 / skill_stat_descriptions.csd 1,899 / atlas 1,354 / gem 1,334 / passive_skill 208 / others <200 each.

data_policy: All structured data here is extracted exclusively from the maintainer's licensed PoE2 install (.datc64) and from the open-source PathOfBuilding-PoE2 community repo (for skill_gems). No third-party wiki / scraped data is bundled. See data/game/README.md for the full policy.
